## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] `npm run demo:build`
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior
- [ ] README documents public API changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG has an `Unreleased` entry

## Impact

- Compatibility:
- Memory and performance:
- Browser, GPU, worker, or WASM behavior:
- Model, dependency, asset, or license changes:
